# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

version: "3.8"

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.13.4
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=es01
      - cluster.name=ops-es
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - xpack.security.enabled=false
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms1g -Xmx1g
      - path.repo=/mnt/es-backups
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
    volumes:
      - esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
      - esbackups:/mnt/es-backups
      - ./ops:/ops:ro
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
      - "9300:9300"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -fsS http://localhost:9200/_cluster/health?wait_for_status=yellow&timeout=60s >/dev/null || exit 1"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 20

  snapshot-ops:
    image: curlimages/curl:8.7.1
    container_name: snapshot-ops
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - ES_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - SNAPSHOT_REPO_TYPE=${SNAPSHOT_REPO_TYPE:-fs}          # fs | s3
      - SNAPSHOT_REPO_NAME=${SNAPSHOT_REPO_NAME:-ops-repo}
      - SNAPSHOT_PREFIX=${SNAPSHOT_PREFIX:-auto}
      - SNAPSHOT_SCHEDULE_CRON=${SNAPSHOT_SCHEDULE_CRON:-0 */6 * * *}
      - SNAPSHOT_KEEP=${SNAPSHOT_KEEP:-20}
      - SNAPSHOT_WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION=${SNAPSHOT_WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION:-true}
      - SNAPSHOT_INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE=${SNAPSHOT_INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE:-true}
      - SNAPSHOT_INDICES=${SNAPSHOT_INDICES:-*}
      - SNAPSHOT_IGNORE_UNAVAILABLE=${SNAPSHOT_IGNORE_UNAVAILABLE:-true}
      - SNAPSHOT_PARTIAL=${SNAPSHOT_PARTIAL:-false}
      - SNAPSHOT_COMPRESSION=${SNAPSHOT_COMPRESSION:-true}
      - SNAPSHOT_MAX_SNAPSHOTS=${SNAPSHOT_MAX_SNAPSHOTS:-200}
      - FS_LOCATION=${FS_LOCATION:-/mnt/es-backups}
      - S3_BUCKET=${S3_BUCKET:-}
      - S3_BASE_PATH=${S3_BASE_PATH:-elasticsearch/snapshots}
      - S3_REGION=${S3_REGION:-us-east-1}
      - S3_ENDPOINT=${S3_ENDPOINT:-}
      - S3_PROTOCOL=${S3_PROTOCOL:-https}
      - S3_PATH_STYLE_ACCESS=${S3_PATH_STYLE_ACCESS:-false}
      - AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID:-}
      - AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY:-}
      - AWS_SESSION_TOKEN=${AWS_SESSION_TOKEN:-}
      - RESTORE_SNAPSHOT=${RESTORE_SNAPSHOT:-}                # set to snapshot name to restore; empty does nothing
      - RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN=${RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN:-}    # optional
      - RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT=${RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT:-} # optional
      - RESTORE_INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE=${RESTORE_INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE:-false}
      - RESTORE_INDICES=${RESTORE_INDICES:-*}
      - RESTORE_WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION=${RESTORE_WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION:-true}
    volumes:
      - esbackups:/mnt/es-backups
      - ./ops:/ops:ro
    entrypoint: ["/bin/sh","-c"]
    command: ["/ops/snapshot-ops.sh"]
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  esdata:
  esbackups:

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: es-snapshot-ops
data:
  snapshot-ops.sh: |
    #!/bin/sh
    set -eu

    ES_URL="${ES_URL:-http://elasticsearch:9200}"
    REPO_TYPE="${SNAPSHOT_REPO_TYPE:-fs}"
    REPO_NAME="${SNAPSHOT_REPO_NAME:-ops-repo}"
    PREFIX="${SNAPSHOT_PREFIX:-auto}"

    CRON="${SNAPSHOT_SCHEDULE_CRON:-0 */6 * * *}"
    KEEP="${SNAPSHOT_KEEP:-20}"
    WAIT="${SNAPSHOT_WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION:-true}"
    INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE="${SNAPSHOT_INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE:-true}"
    INDICES="${SNAPSHOT_INDICES:-*}"
    IGNORE_UNAVAILABLE="${SNAPSHOT_IGNORE_UNAVAILABLE:-true}"
    PARTIAL="${SNAPSHOT_PARTIAL:-false}"
    COMPRESS="${SNAPSHOT_COMPRESSION:-true}"
    MAX_SNAPS="${SNAPSHOT_MAX_SNAPSHOTS:-200}"

    FS_LOCATION="${FS_LOCATION:-/mnt/es-backups}"

    S3_BUCKET="${S3_BUCKET:-}"
    S3_BASE_PATH="${S3_BASE_PATH:-elasticsearch/snapshots}"
    S3_REGION="${S3_REGION:-us-east-1}"
    S3_ENDPOINT="${S3_ENDPOINT:-}"
    S3_PROTOCOL="${S3_PROTOCOL:-https}"
    S3_PATH_STYLE_ACCESS="${S3_PATH_STYLE_ACCESS:-false}"

    RESTORE_SNAPSHOT="${RESTORE_SNAPSHOT:-}"
    RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN="${RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN:-}"
    RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT="${RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT:-}"
    RESTORE_INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE="${RESTORE_INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE:-false}"
    RESTORE_INDICES="${RESTORE_INDICES:-*}"
    RESTORE_WAIT="${RESTORE_WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION:-true}"

    curl_json() {
      method="$1"
      url="$2"
      data="${3:-}"
      if [ -n "$data" ]; then
        curl -fsS -X "$method" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' "$url" -d "$data"
      else
        curl -fsS -X "$method" "$url"
      fi
    }

    wait_es() {
      i=0
      until curl -fsS "$ES_URL/_cluster/health?wait_for_status=yellow&timeout=60s" >/dev/null 2>&1; do
        i=$((i+1))
        if [ "$i" -gt 60 ]; then
          echo "Elasticsearch not ready"
          exit 1
        fi
        sleep 2
      done
    }

    ensure_repo_fs() {
      payload=$(cat <<EOF
    {
      "type": "fs",
      "settings": {
        "location": "${FS_LOCATION}",
        "compress": ${COMPRESS},
        "max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec": "40mb",
        "max_restore_bytes_per_sec": "40mb"
      }
    }
    EOF
    )
      curl_json PUT "$ES_URL/_snapshot/${REPO_NAME}" "$payload" >/dev/null
      curl_json POST "$ES_URL/_snapshot/${REPO_NAME}/_verify" >/dev/null
    }

    ensure_repo_s3() {
      if [ -z "$S3_BUCKET" ]; then
        echo "S3_BUCKET is required for SNAPSHOT_REPO_TYPE=s3"
        exit 1
      fi

      if [ -n "${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID:-}" ] && [ -n "${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY:-}" ]; then
        secure_payload=$(cat <<EOF
    {
      "access_key": "${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}",
      "secret_key": "${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}"${AWS_SESSION_TOKEN:+,
      "session_token": "${AWS_SESSION_TOKEN}"}
    }
    EOF
    )
        curl_json PUT "$ES_URL/_nodes/reload_secure_settings" "{}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        curl_json POST "$ES_URL/_nodes/reload_secure_settings" "{}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        curl_json PUT "$ES_URL/_cluster/settings" "$(cat <<EOF
    {
      "persistent": {
        "s3.client.default.access_key": "${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}",
        "s3.client.default.secret_key": "${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}"${AWS_SESSION_TOKEN:+,
        "s3.client.default.session_token": "${AWS_SESSION_TOKEN}"}${S3_ENDPOINT:+,
        "s3.client.default.endpoint": "${S3_ENDPOINT}"},
        "s3.client.default.protocol": "${S3_PROTOCOL}"
      }
    }
    EOF
    )" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
      fi

      payload=$(cat <<EOF
    {
      "type": "s3",
      "settings": {
        "bucket": "${S3_BUCKET}",
        "base_path": "${S3_BASE_PATH}",
        "region": "${S3_REGION}",
        "compress": ${COMPRESS},
        "max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec": "40mb",
        "max_restore_bytes_per_sec": "40mb",
        "path_style_access": ${S3_PATH_STYLE_ACCESS}${S3_ENDPOINT:+,
        "endpoint": "${S3_ENDPOINT}"}
      }
    }
    EOF
    )
      curl_json PUT "$ES_URL/_snapshot/${REPO_NAME}" "$payload" >/dev/null
      curl_json POST "$ES_URL/_snapshot/${REPO_NAME}/_verify" >/dev/null
    }

    ensure_repo() {
      case "$REPO_TYPE" in
        fs) ensure_repo_fs ;;
        s3) ensure_repo_s3 ;;
        *) echo "Unsupported SNAPSHOT_REPO_TYPE: $REPO_TYPE (use fs or s3)"; exit 1 ;;
      esac
    }

    create_snapshot() {
      ts="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
      snap="${PREFIX}-${ts}"
      payload=$(cat <<EOF
    {
      "indices": "${INDICES}",
      "ignore_unavailable": ${IGNORE_UNAVAILABLE},
      "include_global_state": ${INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE},
      "partial": ${PARTIAL}
    }
    EOF
    )
      curl_json PUT "$ES_URL/_snapshot/${REPO_NAME}/${snap}?wait_for_completion=${WAIT}" "$payload" >/dev/null
      echo "$snap"
    }

    list_snapshots() {
      curl_json GET "$ES_URL/_snapshot/${REPO_NAME}/_all" | tr -d '\n'
    }

    delete_snapshot() {
      snap="$1"
      curl_json DELETE "$ES_URL/_snapshot/${REPO_NAME}/${snap}" >/dev/null
    }

    prune_snapshots() {
      all="$(curl_json GET "$ES_URL/_snapshot/${REPO_NAME}/_all")"
      snaps="$(echo "$all" | sed 's/.*"snapshots":\[\(.*\)\].*/\1/' | tr '{' '\n' | grep '"snapshot"' | sed 's/.*"snapshot":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/' | grep -E "^${PREFIX}-" || true)"
      count="$(echo "$snaps" | sed '/^\s*$/d' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')"
      if [ "$count" -le "$KEEP" ]; then
        return 0
      fi
      to_delete=$((count-KEEP))
      echo "$snaps" | sed '/^\s*$/d' | sort | head -n "$to_delete" | while read -r s; do
        delete_snapshot "$s"
      done
    }

    restore_snapshot() {
      snap="$1"
      rp="$2"
      rr="$3"
      payload_base=$(cat <<EOF
    {
      "indices": "${RESTORE_INDICES}",
      "include_global_state": ${RESTORE_INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE},
      "ignore_unavailable": true
    EOF
    )
      if [ -n "$rp" ] && [ -n "$rr" ]; then
        payload="${payload_base},
      \"rename_pattern\": \"${rp}\",
      \"rename_replacement\": \"${rr}\"
    }"
      else
        payload="${payload_base}
    }"
      fi
      curl_json POST "$ES_URL/_snapshot/${REPO_NAME}/${snap}/_restore?wait_for_completion=${RESTORE_WAIT}" "$payload" >/dev/null
    }

    guard_max_snapshots() {
      all="$(curl_json GET "$ES_URL/_snapshot/${REPO_NAME}/_all")"
      count="$(echo "$all" | grep -o '"snapshot":"' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')"
      if [ "$count" -gt "$MAX_SNAPS" ]; then
        echo "Repository snapshot count (${count}) exceeds SNAPSHOT_MAX_SNAPSHOTS (${MAX_SNAPS}). Refusing to proceed."
        exit 1
      fi
    }

    run_once() {
      wait_es
      ensure_repo
      guard_max_snapshots

      if [ -n "$RESTORE_SNAPSHOT" ]; then
        restore_snapshot "$RESTORE_SNAPSHOT" "$RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN" "$RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT"
        exit 0
      fi

      create_snapshot >/dev/null
      prune_snapshots
    }

    install_cron() {
      if ! command -v crond >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "crond not found; running once and exiting"
        run_once
        exit 0
      fi

      cat >/etc/crontabs/root <<EOF
    ${CRON} /ops/run.sh >>/var/log/snapshot-ops.log 2>&1
    EOF

      touch /var/log/snapshot-ops.log
      crond -f -l 8
    }

    if [ "${1:-}" = "once" ]; then
      run_once
      exit 0
    fi

    install_cron

  run.sh: |
    #!/bin/sh
    set -eu
    /ops/snapshot-ops.sh once

---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: CronJob
metadata:
  name: es-snapshot-cron
spec:
  schedule: "0 */6 * * *"
  concurrencyPolicy: Forbid
  successfulJobsHistoryLimit: 1
  failedJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  jobTemplate:
    spec:
      backoffLimit: 1
      template:
        spec:
          restartPolicy: Never
          containers:
            - name: snapshot-ops
              image: curlimages/curl:8.7.1
              env:
                - name: ES_URL
                  value: "http://elasticsearch:9200"
                - name: SNAPSHOT_REPO_TYPE
                  value: "fs"
                - name: SNAPSHOT_REPO_NAME
                  value: "ops-repo"
                - name: SNAPSHOT_PREFIX
                  value: "auto"
                - name: SNAPSHOT_KEEP
                  value: "20"
                - name: FS_LOCATION
                  value: "/mnt/es-backups"
                - name: SNAPSHOT_WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION
                  value: "true"
                - name: SNAPSHOT_INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE
                  value: "true"
                - name: SNAPSHOT_INDICES
                  value: "*"
              volumeMounts:
                - name: ops
                  mountPath: /ops
                  readOnly: true
                - name: backups
                  mountPath: /mnt/es-backups
              command: ["/bin/sh","-c","/ops/snapshot-ops.sh once"]
          volumes:
            - name: ops
              configMap:
                name: es-snapshot-ops
                defaultMode: 0755
            - name: backups
              persistentVolumeClaim:
                claimName: es-backups-pvc

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: es-backups-pvc
spec:
  accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 200Gi
